contracts.name: ExecutionIntentContract
contracts.purpose: Defines the safe intent input for Page03 compilation.

fields.name: packet_id
fields.description: Stable deterministic packet identifier.

fields.name: project_id
fields.description: Owning project identity inherited from Page01 and Page02.

fields.name: packet_type
fields.description: Typed execution packet category.

fields.name: source_memory_record_ids
fields.description: Page02 memory records used as source evidence.

fields.name: source_stage
fields.description: Source stage that produced the authority.

fields.name: source_state_id
fields.description: Page01 state binding for the packet.

fields.name: visibility
fields.description: Packet visibility policy.

fields.name: boundary_level
fields.description: Node boundary level for execution planning.

fields.name: dependency_ids
fields.description: Deterministic packet dependencies.

fields.name: execution_mode
fields.description: Stage155 is CONTRACT_ONLY and DRY_RUN_READY only.

fields.name: created_from
fields.description: Feature provenance, not raw manuscript text.

fields.name: checksum
fields.description: Deterministic checksum for reproducibility.

fields.name: write_policy
fields.description: Write and mutation policy are disabled.

fields.name: node2_projection_policy
fields.description: Node2 receives only safe packet summaries.
